data.title: David Simon resigns from Klépierre S.A. Supervisory Board on Feb. 19, 2026, announced by Simon Property Group.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Simon®, a real estate investment trust, disclosed that David Simon has stepped down from the Klépierre S.A. Supervisory Board, effective February 19. Simon specializes in owning top-tier shopping, dining, entertainment, and mixed-use locations. This move marks a significant change within the company's leadership structure.

data.description: At 16:00 today, AS Tallink Grupp, a subsidiary of Aktsiaselts Infortar, released a statement about alterations in the Management Board. The detailed announcement can be found below and accessed through the provided link.

data.title: VGTel, Inc. (OTC: VGTL) responds to Trump's UAP disclosure, reaffirms scientific monitoring strategy.
data.description: VGTel, Inc., traded on OTC as VGTL, has issued a statement regarding President Trump's recent disclosure comments regarding Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAP). The company has reiterated its commitment to a scientific monitoring strategy in response to this development.

data.title: Lee Hodgkinson joins Discovery Silver's Board of Directors, effective immediately.Ticker: TSX: DSV, OTCQX: DSVSF.
data.description: Toronto-based company Discovery Silver Corp. (TSX: DSV, OTCQX: DSVSF) announced on February 20, 2026, that Lee Hodgkinson has been appointed to its Board of Directors. This appointment is effective immediately.

data.title: Trigon Property Development AS reported owning a 13.2-hectare development project in Pärnu, Estonia for commercial, industrial, and logistics park.
data.description: Trigon Property Development AS primarily focuses on real estate development. By the end of 31st December 2025, the company possessed a single development project spanning 13.2 hectares located in Pärnu, Estonia. The project aims to establish a commercial, industrial, and logistics park on this land. AS Trigon Property Development's goal is to attract businesses operating in the industrial and logistics sectors to the development area in Pärnu, thereby enhancing the value of the Company's land holdings. In order to prioritize the sale of current land parcels, the company classified investment property as inventories.

data.title: Pennsylvania sees decline in home sales and prices in January due to weather conditions.
data.description: In Lemoyne, Pennsylvania, on February 20, 2026, the housing market experienced a decline in home sales and prices in January. This information comes from the most recent housing report commissioned by the Pennsylvania Association of Realtors®. The drop in sales and prices is attributed to an abundance of snow and unusually low temperatures in the region. The exact figures and percentages of the decline were not specified in the report.

data.title: Key study in UK: Trial testing cancer detection through blood screening failed to reduce later stage cases.
data.description: A highly anticipated clinical trial conducted in the UK, which involved screening blood for early cancer detection, failed to demonstrate a decrease in advanced stages of the disease.

data.title: Trump seeks foreign investment, but proposed tax rules would remove tax exemptions for sovereign wealth funds and foreign government entities investing in the US.
data.description: The tax regulator under the president's administration has introduced new regulations aimed at removing tax exemptions for sovereign wealth funds and other foreign government-controlled entities on certain investments made in the United States. The proposed rules seek to ensure these entities pay taxes on their U.S. investments, potentially impacting a significant amount of money flowing into the country. This move is part of the government's efforts to level the playing field and ensure fairness in taxation for all entities operating within the U.S. Financial markets could see a shift in investment strategies as a result of these proposed changes.

data.title: Maxus Mining Inc. (CSE: MAXM | FRA: R7V) starts trading on OTCQB Venture Market (OTCQB) with symbol "MXMGF" on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: Maxus Mining Inc., based in Vancouver, British Columbia, shared on February 18, 2026, that its common shares (referred to as "Shares") are now listed on the OTCQB Venture Market ("OTCQB") as of February 17, 2026. The company can be found under the trading symbol "MXMGF." This move allows for increased visibility and accessibility to investors, potentially aiding in boosting market participation. Maxus Mining Inc.'s trading on the OTCQB includes the following stock exchange identifiers: CSE: MAXM, FRA: R7V, OTCQB: MXMGF.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures up, Nvidia gains on Meta AI deal, rivals fall. Palo Alto tumbled on guidance. via Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Stock market futures saw an increase amidst ongoing division among investors. A recent agreement between Nvidia and Meta in the field of artificial intelligence boosted Nvidia's position as a leading AI chip provider, causing a decline in its competitors. Conversely, Palo Alto suffered a decrease in stock value due to a less favorable outlook. The Dow Jones futures showed a rise, reflecting the positive impact of Nvidia's collaboration with Meta, leading to gains for Nvidia and declines for its rivals.

data.title: Fed's key inflation rate rises, GDP growth drops, leading to lower rate-cut odds. Live coverage. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The likelihood of a rate cut has decreased recently as per market trends. Following the Federal Reserve's announcement of a high key inflation rate, the GDP growth has seen a significant decline. Live coverage of these developments can be found on Investor's Business Daily.
